positive: A whimsical and stylized composition featuring a grouping of woodland creatures (fox, squirrel, owl, rabbit) engaged in a playful picnic under a glowing forest canopy. The style should be sophisticated Scandinavian folk illustration mixed with Art Nouveau elements, utilizing clean, thick outlines and flat color fields with subtle gradients. The central focus is the picnic spread, featuring stylized berries, macarons, and miniature lanterns. Use a limited, harmonious palette of emerald green, terracotta orange, dusty blue, and creamy cream. Composition must be centered and highly symmetrical, maximizing clean, bold silhouettes for easy transfer to textiles. Flat lay perspective, perfect for apparel printing, high contrast, high detail, vector graphic quality.
negative: blur, low resolution, artifacts, watermark, text, logo, signature, sloppy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, distorted, noisy, grain, copyright, celebrity
